name: Downer Edi Limited
analysis: DOW's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 3% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$8.2000. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$8.2300, stop A$7.6032, target A$10.1104 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
